MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: L. Fong, Not Reported. (501/306/RBU)
Appearances on WED-JUN-29-2016:
Plaintiff Florence Atangan is present.
Attorney Daniel M. Bornstein for the plaintiff.
Defendant Nestor Vergara is present and assisted by court certified Tagalog interpreter Caroline Carrera.
Attorney Carolyn Gold appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of July 5, 2016 remains on calendar. (501/306/RBU)
